name: Steak-And-Shrimp Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 20 large Shrimp, fresh, peeled and deveined - about 1 lb.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a bowl; stir well to combine.
2. Add the steak and shrimp to the mixture; cover and marinate in the refrigerator for 3 to 4 hours or overnight.
3. Cut a thick slice from the top and bottom of the pineapple. Quarter the pineapple lengthwise, removing the rind and core. Cut into 1-1/2 inch thick chunks. Set aside.
4. Remove the steak and shrimp from the marinade, reserving the liquid.
5. Alternate pieces of steak, shrimp, pineapple, and mushrooms on skewers for grilling.
6. In a small saucepan, gradually stir the cornstarch into the reserved marinade. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly.
7. Grill the kabobs 3 minutes over medium coals; turn and brush with marinade.
8. Grill the kabobs for an additional 5 minutes or until they reach the desired degree of doneness, brushing with marinade as needed.
